notes: Level 5 manual review override shard for spell indexes 35-39 in generated discovery row order.

mass-cure-wounds::choice_or_mode.issue: The chosen point, 30-foot-radius sphere, and up-to-six creature target cap are represented in targeting.
mass-cure-wounds::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: No new choice field required for this pass.
mass-cure-wounds::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by area targeting and maxTargets 6.

mass-cure-wounds::healing_or_restoration.issue: The healing amount, spellcasting ability modifier formula, +1d8 scaling, and Undead/Construct exclusion are now represented by a HEALING effect.
mass-cure-wounds::healing_or_restoration.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by HEALING effect with target filter and scaling.

mass-cure-wounds::object_stats_or_damage.issue: The detector matched hit points, but the spell heals creature hit points and does not involve object stats or object damageability.

mass-cure-wounds::status_or_state_change.issue: The no-effect rule for Undead and Constructs is now represented by the HEALING target filter.
mass-cure-wounds::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by excluding Undead and Construct targets.

mislead::choice_or_mode.issue: The caster can choose the illusory double's gestures, speech, behavior, and sense source, but runtime has no typed illusion-control mode fields.

mislead::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The detector matched bonus-action sense switching; Mislead does not modify attacks, saves, or checks.

mislead::sustain_or_recast_action.issue: The action to move and animate the illusory double and the repeat bonus-action sense switch are prose-only in runtime.
mislead::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedTemplateChange: Add illusion-control action and repeat sense-toggle fields.
mislead::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime grantedActions for double movement/animation and sense switching.

mislead::vision_light_sound.issue: Invisible, remote sight/hearing, and self-Blinded/Deafened while using the double's senses are all prose-only.
mislead::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Add fields for invisibility, remote visual/auditory perception, and local sensory suppression.
mislead::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime Invisible, Blinded, Deafened, and remoteSenses data.

mislead::illusion_or_disguise.issue: The illusory double appears, moves up to twice caster speed, gestures, speaks, and behaves as chosen; runtime lacks typed illusion-double fields.
mislead::illusion_or_disguise.recommendedTemplateChange: Add illusory double entity fields with movement and behavior controls.

mislead::sensor_or_remote_perception.issue: The caster can see and hear through the double and switch senses each turn; runtime lacks typed remote-sensor fields.
mislead::sensor_or_remote_perception.recommendedTemplateChange: Add remote senses fields with action cost and local-sense tradeoff.

mislead::message_or_communication.issue: The illusory double can speak and gesture as part of its behavior, but runtime lacks typed illusion speech/gesture fields.
mislead::message_or_communication.recommendedTemplateChange: Add illusion communication fields for speech and gestures.

mislead::social_or_knowledge_effect.issue: Remote perception through the double affects what the caster can know, but runtime lacks typed remote perception semantics.

mislead::status_or_state_change.issue: Invisible, Blinded, and Deafened states are prose-only in runtime, including the condition that invisibility ends on attacking or casting a spell.
mislead::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add status fields and conditional ending fields for Mislead.
mislead::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime Invisible/Blinded/Deafened status data plus invisibility ending triggers.

modify-memory::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Wisdom save, fighting-target advantage, failed-save Charmed condition, and Incapacitated rider are now represented.
modify-memory::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: No new attack/save field required for this pass.
modify-memory::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by STATUS_CONDITION effects with saveModifiers.

modify-memory::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched visible target selection, already represented by lineOfSight targeting.

modify-memory::message_or_communication.issue: The caster must speak the memory description and the target must understand the caster's language; runtime lacks language/comprehension fields.

modify-memory::social_or_knowledge_effec.issue: The spell's core memory modification options, event age/window limits, language requirement, plausibility caveats, and higher-level time windows remain prose-only.
modify-memory::social_or_knowledge_effec.recommendedTemplateChange: Add memory modification fields for operation type, event age, event duration, language requirement, plausibility caveats, and slot scaling windows.

modify-memory::healing_or_restoration.issue: Remove Curse or Greater Restoration can restore the true memory; runtime lacks typed external-spell restoration fields.
modify-memory::healing_or_restoration.recommendedTemplateChange: Add removable/restorable-by-spell fields for altered memories.

modify-memory::status_or_state_change.issue: The failed-save Charmed and Incapacitated states are now represented as runtime STATUS_CONDITION effects.
modify-memory::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: No new status field required for this pass.
modify-memory::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by Charmed and Incapacitated effects.

modify-memory::environmental_change.issue: The detector matched an example memory involving acid; the spell does not create acid or alter the environment.

modify-memory::conditional_ending.issue: Damage, another spell targeting the creature, or ending before the memory description is complete prevents memory alteration; runtime lacks those ending and success-condition branches.

modify-memory::aftermath_or_memory.issue: The modified memory takes hold when the spell ends only if the description is complete; runtime lacks typed memory aftermath/finalization data.

negative-energy-flood::attack_or_save_mo.issue: The non-Undead Constitution save branch and Undead no-save branch are now separated in runtime.
negative-energy-flood::attack_or_save_mo.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by DAMAGE exclude Undead plus HEALING Undead branch.

negative-energy-flood::vision_light_soun.issue: Visible target selection is represented, but the zombie's pursuit of the closest visible creature remains prose-only with the zombie aftermath.
negative-energy-flood::vision_light_soun.recommendedTemplateChange: Add zombie behavior fields for visible nearest-creature pursuit.

negative-energy-flood::healing_or_restor.issue: The Undead target's temporary hit points equal to half of 5d12 are now represented as a HEALING effect.
negative-energy-flood::healing_or_restor.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by HEALING temporary HP branch.

negative-energy-flood::object_stats_or_d.issue: The detector matched temporary hit points, but no object stats or object damageability are involved.

negative-energy-flood::status_or_state_c.issue: The spell-killed target rising as a zombie at the start of the caster's next turn is not yet represented.

passwall::choice_or_mode.issue: The caster chooses opening dimensions up to 5 feet wide, 8 feet tall, and 20 feet deep; runtime has only a coarse cube size.
passwall::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add opening dimension fields for width, height, and depth maxima.

passwall::target_filter_or_eligibility.issue: The target point must be on a wooden, plaster, or stone surface, and later ejection goes to the nearest unoccupied space; runtime lacks material/surface and ejection-destination fields.
passwall::target_filter_or_eligibility.recommendedTemplateChange: Add surface material eligibility and ejection destination fields.
passwall::target_filter_or_eligibility.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime surfaceEligibility and ejectionDestination data.

passwall::terrain_or_surface.issue: The wooden/plaster/stone wall, ceiling, or floor surface requirement remains prose-only.
passwall::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: Add passage surface fields for allowed materials and orientations.

passwall::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched visible target point selection, already represented by lineOfSight targeting.

passwall::created_object_or_structure.issue: Runtime now marks the utility as creation, but the passwall opening's dimensions, no-instability rider, and safe ejection behavior are still prose-only.
passwall::created_object_or_structure.recommendedTemplateChange: Add passage-creation fields for dimensions, structural stability, and ejection on disappearance.

negative-energy-flood.title: Summons And Controlled Entities
negative-energy-flood.canonicalEvidence: A target killed by this damage rises up as a zombie at the start of your next turn. The zombie pursues whatever creature it can see that is closest to it. Statistics for the zombie are in the Monster Manual.
negative-energy-flood.jsonState: Runtime has damage and Undead temporary HP branches, but no zombie aftermath entity.
negative-energy-flood.issue: The death-triggered zombie is a created/controlled entity aftermath and remains prose-only.
negative-energy-flood.recommendedTemplateChange: Add death-triggered zombie creation fields with behavior and timing.

negative-energy-flood.title: Aftermath And Memory Effects
negative-energy-flood.canonicalEvidence: A target killed by this damage rises up as a zombie at the start of your next turn.
negative-energy-flood.jsonState: Runtime has no death aftermath timing field.
negative-energy-flood.issue: The target's death aftermath happens at the start of the caster's next turn and needs a typed aftermath/timing surface.
